theme: lighthouse keeper bolting lamps to a rotating cliff
title: Bolting Lamps to a Rotating Cliff -- budgeted cache pinning under drift
strategies: trivial: bolt nothing -> reproduces the no-bolt LRU baseline (~0.1)
greedy: each epoch bolt the top-p lamps by this epoch's raw access frequency, within bandwidth -- bolts the L2-served decoy and is one epoch late at every regime

strong: shortest-path DP over (epoch, bolt-set) states ranking lamps by avoided cost (freq x cost-if-unbolted) and pre-bolting an incoming lamp the epoch before it peaks when a regime turns >Bmax lamps hot at once
headroom: the per-key benefit ignores L2 coupling between bolted lamps and the finite candidate window, so a jointly-optimal schedule scores above strong
